title: silene kingii
intro: Silene kingii, also known as sky pilot, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Silene kingii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to address various health concerns.
